resources.name: Tradee API
resources.description: Insomnia collection for the Webserver-project Flask API

resources.name: GET /api/categories
POST /api/login
GET /api/auctions
GET /api/auctions/:auction_id
POST /api/auctions/:auction_id/bid
PUT /api/auctions/remove_published
POST /api/auctions

body.text:
{
  "name": "Vintage Chair",
  "description": "Solid wood chair in great condition",
  "category": "furniture",
  "price": 50.0,
  "auction_time": 86400,
  "location": "Stockholm",
  "condition": "used",
  "published": true,
  "image_small": null,
  "image_large": "https://example.com/images/chair.jpg"
}

resources.name: PUT /api/auctions/:auction_id
POST /api/users
GET /api/users (Auth)
GET /api/users/:user_id
